title: Automate SAP order-to-cash with multi-agent AI & Google Agent Development Kit (ADK)
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates automating SAP order-to-cash processes using the Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) to replace brittle RPA scripts with intelligent multi-agent teams. The demonstration shows how to convert SAP OData/OpenAPI specifications into MCP servers, structure multi-agent hierarchies, and leverage Gemini's 1-million-token context window for enterprise workflows.
